# antfu/eslint-config `@antfu/eslint-config@9.0.0`

**References:** [package.json](./.skilld/pkg/package.json) • [README](./.skilld/pkg/README.md) • [Docs](./.skilld/docs/_INDEX.md)

## Search

Use `skilld search "query" -p @antfu/eslint-config` instead of grepping `.skilld/` directories. Run `skilld search --guide -p @antfu/eslint-config` for full syntax, filters, and operators.
